package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceMapStringBoolForMembership() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_map_string_bool_for_membership"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map[string]bool membership sets where map[string]struct{} avoids unnecessary value storage."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
